mdx:
select {[Measures].[Unit Sales]} on columns,
  {[Store].[USA].[CA].[Los Angeles].Parent} on rows
from Sales

sqlExecutions.sql: select "store"."store_state" as "c0", "time_by_day"."the_year" as "c1", sum("sales_fact_1997"."unit_sales") as "m0" from "sales_fact_1997" as "sales_fact_1997", "store" as "store", "time_by_day" as "time_by_day" where "store"."store_state" = 'CA' and "time_by_day"."the_year" = 1997 and "sales_fact_1997"."store_id" = "store"."store_id" and "sales_fact_1997"."time_id" = "time_by_day"."time_id" group by "store"."store_state", "time_by_day"."the_year"
